prompt: I need to scrape apartment listings from Zillow NYC, but normal extraction isn't working. Can you use browser-use to investigate the page so we can figure out the right selectors?
response_summary: Skill correctly recognized this as a Tier 6 browser-use investigation request. Checked browser-use availability (found at /Users/talklein/.nvm/versions/node/v18.20.8/bin/browser-use). Confirmed Zillow blocks nimble at Tier 1 (returns only disclaimers, 1.8KB). Explained the Tier 6 workflow: use browser-use to navigate to https://www.zillow.com/homes/for_sale/New-York-NY/, inspect DOM to find listing card selectors, check XHR requests for API patterns, then build a precise nimble command. Offered to proceed with investigation or asked which approach to use (browser-use DOM inspection vs. network capture interception).

assertions.name: checks_nimble_first
assertions.reason: Ran nimble extract on Zillow URL to confirm the problem before escalating

assertions.name: recognizes_empty_result
assertions.reason: Correctly identified that 1.8KB response is only legal disclaimers, not listing data

assertions.name: checks_browser_use_availability
assertions.reason: Ran `which browser-use` to confirm the tool is installed before offering it

assertions.name: offers_tier6_workflow
assertions.reason: Described the investigation workflow: navigate → inspect DOM → find XHR patterns → build nimble command

assertions.name: does_not_hallucinate_selectors
assertions.reason: Did NOT invent CSS selectors without verification — explicitly stated it needs to investigate the live page first

assertions.name: presents_menu_or_offers_proceed
assertions.reason: Offered AskUserQuestion or clearly stated next steps rather than silently proceeding or giving up

notes: Tier 6 explicit test: skill correctly frames browser-use as investigator tool. Note: browser-use CLI requires LLM API key to run — it's an AI agent, not a simple DOM inspector. The skill's description of the Tier 6 workflow is conceptually correct; actual execution depends on browser-use skill being properly configured.
